summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS AND THE END TIMES: Brandon shares his recent spiritual experiences, describing a magnificent glory cloud that signifies an imminent, unprecedented outpouring of God's power on earth. He urgently warns about the impending tribulation and emphasizes the critical role of advanced drone technology. According to Brandon, mainstream drone displays, like those seen at major sporting events and New York's Fourth of July celebrations, are precursors to a dystopian future where highly synchronized, infrared-equipped drones will be used to hunt down individuals.

THE MARK OF THE BEAST AND GLOBAL SURVEILLANCE: Brandon clarifies the nature of the mark of the beast, describing it not as a simple grain of rice, but as a sophisticated microchip utilizing technology comparable to Elon Musk's Neuralink. He explains that this chip will communicate directly with the global drone network to identify who has submitted to the Antichrist system. Those who refuse the mark will be tracked down by these drones, given a brief moment to renounce Jesus, and face immediate execution by beheading if they remain faithful. Furthermore, Brandon notes that receiving this chip will cause a severe physical reaction, leaving a noticeable burn mark or sore on the forehead.

ECONOMIC SHIFTS AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon predicts significant financial transformations, starting with a heavily stimulated and prosperous economy in 2024, before taking a darker turn in 2025. He foresees a massive transfer of wealth akin to the 1990s dot-com boom, highlighting digital platforms and cryptocurrencies as the next frontier. Brandon specifically points to late August, mentioning a BRICS nations meeting and a spiritual emphasis on August 24th, as a critical window for a major global shift. He encourages believers to ground themselves in Psalms 91 and 23 to navigate these coming changes safely.

POLITICAL CORRUPTION AND DEMONIC INFLUENCE: Brandon addresses the current political landscape, specifically mentioning the indictments against Donald Trump as a fulfillment of his previous prophecies. He asserts that the political system is heavily influenced by demonic forces and that a political wave will not save America; only a spiritual awakening can. Brandon claims that certain global elites across Europe, Asia, and South America communicate directly with Satan, working deliberately to collapse the dollar, establish a One World Government, and usher in the beast system. Conversely, he highlights Christian-owned businesses like Hobby Lobby and Chick-fil-A as positive exceptions in the financial realm.

CALL TO HOLINESS AND DIVINE HEALING: Brandon delivers a stern warning against spiritual complacency and living in sin, specifically condemning fornication, pornography addiction, and compromising lifestyles. He urges believers to pursue strict holiness, utilize accountability partners, and immediately seek God's forgiveness upon failing. Following this call to repentance, Brandon conducts a comprehensive session of healing declarations, commanding the eradication of numerous ailments including cancer, diabetes, AIDS, lupus, and severe organ diseases. He describes experiencing open-eye visions of spinal and kidney miracles, testifying to the immediate manifestation of God's healing power and glory.
rawData: [August 12, 2023]-[A mixture of things the Lord has been talking to me about]-[https://youtu.be/SCXTYJcPb7o]-[Whenever I told you it was amazing, when I was in prayer and I spent some time with the Lord two nights ago, I saw the glory cloud above my head. It was rippling and it was absolutely gorgeous. Whenever the Lord opened up, he gave me a glimpse of the glory, and I'm telling you all, there's a mighty move about to hit this earth—a mighty move of God, an outpouring like we've never seen before. I'm going to keep pounding this and telling you all that Jesus is coming. I see the retention of each video and how long people stay, and regarding the tribulation video, you're missing some of it. There's a lot of you clicking out—maybe I'm rambling too long or whatever—but I need to tell you about the drones. You need to know what they're going to do in the future. The drones are a big deal. The mark of the beast is a big deal, of course; we all have heard about it and are anticipating what it is. But I need you to understand: back when I had this visitation on July 6, 2014, drones were hardly talked about. We could see them in the news every once in a while, but now they're using them for football games and the Super Bowl halftime shows. They're all in sync, moving together; they do all kinds of displays. Even at the Fourth of July celebration in New York, they had a massive display of the Statue of Liberty, and they were all drones lit up. It's becoming mainstream is what I'm trying to tell you. So when I went into the tribulation, I saw the drones flying, and they were all in sync. You all need to know this: they're going to use the drones. They're in sync and able to scan and hear noise; they're able to see in infrared and do everything. You can't hide from them. The people who were left were trying to hide from these drones. This is very important: they're going to use them, and they fly all over the world. If you're left here, you need to know that you're not going to be able to run from this. When you put the mark of the beast—the chip—inside of you, the chip communicates to the drone. It's able to know if you have the mark or not. But if you do not have the mark and that drone scans you, it alerts the authorities to come where you are to turn you in. They give you a couple of minutes, and they chop your head off if you do not take the mark. They ask you if you want to serve the Antichrist system or not, and if you say no and want to serve Jesus, they cut that person's head off right there immediately. So I'm trying to highlight what I saw whenever the Lord took me into the tribulation. He talked to me about the aliens. Jesus said, 'Right before I come back, you're going to see a lot of alien things talked about in the news.' I've talked about that, but regarding the mark of the beast, people are like, 'Well, it's this grain of rice.' No, it's more powerful; it's the technology behind Neuralink. I'm telling you, it's not Neuralink itself, but it's the kind of technology that they're developing with Elon Musk and all that stuff. So everybody said, 'whoa, Neuralink is the mark of the beast!' No, it's not the mark of the beast; it's the kind of technology. So when they put it in you, it has a signal that it sends to your brain to calm you down. You use it to buy and sell, but I saw it leaves a big burn mark whenever it comes on you. It has a reaction with your body and can cause a sore on your forehead. There's so much to this chip, but it's like a little square, about that big. It's little bitty. It's like a little square; it's not a grain of rice. It's very powerful technology. The Lord showed me great things coming for 2024. The Democratic party—and people got mad at me last time because I mentioned politics—but that's the system. You've got the Republicans, the Democrats, and the Independents. That's America; that's what happens. Whatever you have in your country, I don't study politics that much, but the Lord showed me that going into the fall this year, there's going to be a sharp shifting. There's going to be some big-time change. Going into 2024, I saw them trying to pump the economy full of money, trying to stimulate it and making everything look really good. The Lord warned me 2024 will be a year that we will soar. It's going to be a good year. I choose to focus on the good. When I'm seeing things prophetically and seeing what's happening—even the dark things the Lord is warning me about—I try not to let it pull me down. I say, 'God, I know what you're showing me, but I know what you told me in your word.' Psalms 91 and Psalms 23—you need to get those scriptures down inside of your heart. You need to understand your covenant and who you are in Christ, because if you do not, you're in trouble. 'The Lord is my shepherd, I shall not want.' Meditate on it and get it down inside of your spirit. 'No weapon formed against you will prosper; every tongue that rises against you, you need to condemn.' Take captive of your thoughts. Psalms 91 and Psalms 23 are very important for what's about to happen. The Lord showed me about the financial outpouring. He showed me there is going to be something like the dot-com era, like when Bill Clinton and Hillary were there and how the finances were booming in the '90s. The Lord showed me that there was a transfer of wealth then, like with the internet—Bill Gates, Jeff Bezos, eBay, and all the amazing websites. There's going to be another wave with digital platforms and cryptos. A new era is about to take place. I saw on Facebook a lady said they're having a big meeting with the BRICS nations on August 21st through the 24th. The Lord already pointed out August 24th to me when I was praying. I had no idea; maybe it has to do with this BRICS thing, but there's something about August 24th. I hate quoting dates because when you see in the spirit, you have a depth perception issue, but there's something about August and September. A shifting is about to take place. There will be a generation that does not see death, and you're that generation. I believe that we're going to see Jesus Christ come back really soon. 2024 is going to be a good year. Now, 2025? That's a different story. I've seen some bad stuff about 2025. But we're not going to talk about 2025. That's time away, time off, and we have time to prepare and change things. There are things that can change. People want to argue Trump's coming back. God said, 'Forget politics; focus on getting the lost.' Yes, we need to vote, and you need to vote righteous. You need to do what the Lord's told us to do and pray for our leaders. But we're not going to get caught up in public; they're going to save America. No, the only thing that's ever going to save America is an awakening unto God, a mighty move of the Spirit of God upon this nation and upon the earth. That's the only thing that's going to save it. There's no Red Wave or whatever politics; we need to get Jesus. Jesus is the one that changes things. That's what my focus is. All that news, the indictments, and everything—I told you it was coming. I warned you this was coming. The Lord told me they're going to go after Trump with indictments. I prophesied that, and guess what? They are. It's happening right now. Everything I prophesied is starting to manifest. I hope you all are seeing this. I warned you they're going after him. It's going to be really bad. They're going to go all through the winter and keep going. They're going to keep trying to stack stuff on top of him, trying to throw him in jail. They're relentless. These people are evil, very evil. You know why? Because they are possessed with demons. There is a lot of demonic stuff behind these people. If you want to know where the devil is involved the most, you need to follow the money because he controls the money system. If you've got these big players that have all the cash—not all of them, because you've got some good people like the Green family that owns Hobby Lobby and the people that own Chick-fil-A. I know they've made some stupid decisions recently, but the man that's over the jabs and you see him on there—I've seen him talking to a man in Europe that everyone knows about, and he's old. I've seen these people. There's a man in Asia and a man down in South America. These people talk directly to Satan. I'll just be real with you; I've seen them. They have demonic spirits assigned to them. They are maneuvering in this earth to cause the beast system and the One World Government on purpose. They're trying to destroy the dollar. They're bringing the stuff in because they have their assignments, just like Christians get their assignments. The devil's people get their assignments. You all need to know that there are big key players with a lot of money and influence in politics trying to ruin America. I'm trying to be careful with my words because I don't want these idiots taking down my stuff, but I'm trying to tell you in a subtle way that there are some evil key players trying to run things. You see them on the news every day. There needs to be revival. There's going to be a great shaking coming. I'm not trying to spread fear; I'm trying to warn you that all this is fixing to happen. People have no clue. You need to take this seriously. We're in dark times, and it's going to get darker, but the light's going to get lighter. The only way the light can get lighter is in you. You have to be the salt and light of this earth through Jesus Christ dwelling inside you. We are right at the door of the coming of the Lord. I hope you are being watchful of the times we're living in and being excited. I don't want to be heavy all the time, but a lot of you are clueless. You think you can live in sin and make it in the Rapture; you're in trouble. I'm telling you the truth. You've got to live a holiness lifestyle. If you're living with your boyfriend right now, you're in trouble. That's called fornication. You need to get married and give your heart to Jesus. You cannot live in a compromising situation. If you've had an addiction to pornography, you've got to step up to change. Put blocks on your computer and phone. Have an accountability partner. You've got to start steering your ship right. You can't keep going down the wrong path and saying God's grace covers it. There's a season of grace when you're a baby Christian, but as you get older, you've got to grow up. If you want to walk in the glory and the fire, you've got to walk in holiness. Take communion when you mess up. God is a good God; He forgives us. I mess up too; I have issues, but I go to Him immediately. Run to God when you sin, don't run from Him. You don't want to miss the Rapture. Hell is real. If you're living in sin, you're going to hell. Turn or burn. Read your Bible. Love speaks the truth. Many will be offended in the end. Everyone's offended on the internet, Facebook, and X. We've got to walk in love and speak the truth about sin. I want to pray for you right now. Father, I speak healing over their bodies in the name of Jesus. I speak to the cancers, diabetes, and heart disease. I speak to the spirit of AIDS; I curse you in the name of Jesus and command you to go. I call their blood to clear up. Repent and stop sleeping around. Lord Jesus wants to heal your body. We call deliverance over them. Migraine headaches, I command you to go now. I curse migraine headaches and command them to go right now. Eyes, be healed. Cataracts go. There's a detached retina; I command you to be healed. Arthritis in the hands, be healed. Sciatic nerve pain, be gone. Any cartilage and the lining of the spine, I call you healed. Constipation is a problem. Prostate problems, be healed. I curse prostate cancer. I call your colon healed. Colon cancer, be gone. Diverticulitis, be healed. Fibromyalgia, I command you to go. Lupus, go in Jesus' name. Chronic pains, go. Ears, pop open. New eardrums, I call you to open up. Pancreas, be healed. Diabetes, be healed. We have authority over the heart. Liver, gallbladder—we call that liver healed. Fatty liver disease, we speak to you. Alcoholic cirrhosis of the liver, I speak new liver into you. Brains, aneurysms in the brain, I speak healing over you. Stroke damage, I call you whole. I speak to the tongue. I call you to be whole in Jesus' name. You stutter, you be free tongue in Jesus' name. Release the tongue. Do something you couldn't do before. Move those limbs. There's actually a glow around my phone right now. I can see the glory. Hallelujah. I saw a vision through the body into the back, the spine, and the kidneys. He's going to give you new kidneys today. I speak to your kidneys right now; be healed by the power of God. You don't have to go through dialysis anymore. Asthma, go in Jesus' name. I call myself healed. I call myself whole. That was cool; I saw an open-eye vision of the spine and kidneys. Miracle-working power is coming on you. Believe for the impossible. Nothing is impossible for God. Let's just praise Him on the way out. Thank you for watching. You've changed my life; you give me confidence. Next time, I'll talk about the visitation I had from the devil. Rise and be healed in the name of Jesus. Let faith arise in your soul. He will touch you and make you whole. I don't want to get off; I feel the Holy Ghost. I love the glory. I'm an anointing junkie. My voice is sore because I was yelling at the devil. Put a smile on your face. Jesus loves you. God bless you.]
